review_title: Huge help with optimizing internal search
description: For a relatively small amount of money we have got a very nice tool which just works. And is was also very easy to implement.
author: Ondřej Š.
pros: It helped us to solve a longterm problem with internal search functionality which was very hard to optimize within our native CMS functionality.
cons: For a long time there were no analytical outcomes to see how people use the search. However this was solved and now I have no more issues to handle.

review_title: Get the search on a new level
description: A great solution for web search, equipped with numerous useful tools. Undoubtedly, it stands as one of the top choices to consider when evaluating search tools for your website or eshop.
author: Miroslav S.
pros: Luigi's Box, a fantastic and user-friendly tool, elevates your web search experience. Getting started is effortless, and mastering its usage is a breeze. It furnishes abundant insights into user search behavior, search outcomes, and queries yielding no results. Moreover, it furnishes numerous solutions and suggestions to optimize your outcomes, enhance the average basket value and maximize return on investment.
cons: The cost-effectiveness of this tool varies depending on your utilization. A poorly configured setup and/or use may incur high expenses, but with a well-executed setup, costs can be mitigated. Proper configuration ensures swift realization of ROI.

review_title: Luigi's Box Search
description: LBX is not perfect, as, at every SaaS, there are some minor bugs, but the company is approaching it very well with near to immediate solutions. Communication with LBX is easy and very responsive.
author: Matej H.
pros: Luigi's Box is really outgoing, willing to cooperate in multiple areas, providing custom solutions tailored for our needs.
cons: Quite heavy need of proper feed setup(on our side) in order for everything to work properly. But that is something you generally need to count on.

review_title: Robust ecommerce search engine
description: We are overall very happy with the solution, it works well almost all of the time and when it does not, their customer support usually deals with everything as soon as possible.
author: Michal P.
pros: It has all the necessary features like rule-based merchandizing, synonyms and synonym suggestions (that are surprisingly good), even a tool to do A/B testing. Other than that the basics are very automated and do not need much human input.
cons: Analytics. They are lacking the option to do previous period comparisons and metric trends over time.

review_title: Helps customers navigate their search
description: Search data allows us to make informed decisions, refine our offerings, and ensure customers can easily find what they need.
author: Mikhail S.
pros: The Autocomplete feature is especially useful, guiding users who may not have a clear idea of what they are looking for toward relevant texts, categories or products. Additionally, the banner insertion feature is a great tool for highlighting special offers for our customers. Overall, it’s a smart solution that significantly improves search functionality on our website.
cons: We are fully satisfied, no complaints from my team.

review_title: Excellent Search & Recommendation Tool – Highly Recommended!
description: I have been using Luigi's Box for some time now and it has greatly improved the search and recommendation capabilities of our website.
author: Denis D.
pros: Luigi's box is extremely helpful in finding what customers are looking for. Very often our customers don't know exactly what the item they want is called within the industry, and the search is very helpful in selecting what the customer really wants.
cons: I really can't think of any downsides. It may take a little time to learn how to use all the features,but tech support is always helpful.

review_title: Luigi's Box has perfect support team
description: Our decision to use Luigi’s Box was driven by its strong commitment to enhancing the search experience for our users.
author: Jakub R.
pros: I like the flexibility of Luigi's Box customizable settings and the depth of its search insights, which provide us with a clearer understanding of user search behavior and preferences. Additionally, the customer support team stands out for its responsiveness and efficiency in answering our requests.
cons: I have no complaints—it works exactly as expected.

review_title: search that sells: luigi’s box boosted conversions in weeks
author: Lukas C.
pros: luigi’s box plugged into our shop in a single afternoon, and its self-learning autocomplete, semantic ranking, and cross-sell widgets immediately surfaced the most relevant products, guiding shoppers from query to checkout with almost no manual tuning.
cons: we have no major complaints, although the deeper analytics views sit a layer or two down in the menu and the jump between pricing tiers feels a bit opaque once your catalogue grows past the entry bracket.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It gets the job done
description: Overall I can say that it is a useful tool, we track what the customers are looking for in our e-shop and in case we do not have what they lok for, we can implement it into our portfolio.
author: Adam S.
pros: Advanced AI Search, Personalization & Recommendations, Comprehensive Analytics, Boosted Conversion Rates
cons: The implementation time is a bit longer but that is just something that you cannot evade due to the fact that the data has to be put there manually.

review_title: Excellent seach engine
description: We tried to increase the conversion rate from search, because we only used simple search, which did not help customers find what they were looking for. That is why we decided to implement Luigi's Box that significantly increased the conversion rate. We can push our products in campaigns better using Luigi's Box and constantly optimize results.
author: Zoltán S.
pros: - a significant increase in the conversion rate from search - many options for optimization and personalization of the search - easy to use, even new employee can immediately start working with LB - customer support with very quick response
cons: - price for the service, but it is rather a matter of negotiation

review_title: Great choice to improve the conversion
description: I have had only a great experience with LB. Even in one of our Hackatons, colleagues from LB made an extra mile and helped us with our thoughts to be turned into a reality.
author: Tomáš J.
pros: First and foremost, improved conversion rate, suggestions of the products for the business to grow and individual approach from LB.
cons: Due to many options that LB provide, it is sometimes difficult to navigate in order to improve the numbers.

review_title: Great searching tool for your web
description: We had a lot of good references for this product so we went straight for it while looking for this kind of tool. Initial setup was very straightforward and Luigi's box worked almost immediately after implementation. Customer service at Luigi's box is always nice and very helpful. Never had a bad experience. Luigi's box is simply great searching tools with great tools in addition which I would definitly recommend to anyone.
author: Tomas R.
pros: Besides great searching tools we like additioan features such as Recommender which (obviously from its name) recommends products based on customers browsing and searching history. These recomendations are part of product page, not searching results which looks more naturally. Also banner campaigns is great tool to promote products in search results. All these features simply help to increase the sales in general.
cons: The product may seem a bit pricy at the beginning but in the end it pays of.

review_title: Review after 2 years of using Luigi's Box in mobile spare parts eccom. industry
author: Igor K.
pros: Luigi's Box has played a crucial role in enhancing the effectiveness of our online store. Its sophisticated analytics offer essential insights into customer search patterns, enabling us to make decisions based on data.
cons: The intricacy of setting up advanced features involves a learning curve, and we occasionally need extra assistance to fully leverage these functionalities.

review_title: Do you want to have a user-friendly e-shop? Buy Luigis Box.
description: I recommend Luigis Box to all e-shops and e-commerce platform.
author: Veronika F.
pros: I like all the LB features that we use - search, recommenders and analytics. The most important for us is searching feature. Our customers can find what they need.
cons: Sometimes my team miss information about new features.

review_title: Luigi's box is a great searching tool for your website
description: With Luigi's Box, I can better understand what customers are currently interested in, which trends are prevalent, and which categories they search for most frequently.
author: Patrik G.
pros: The tool offers a great price/performance ratio, ensuring flawless operation. It is user-friendly, provides customized solutions, and comes with fast support.
cons: I didn't encounter any problem during use and even during integration.

review_title: Only good experiences
description: We have had a good experience since launch. The LugiBox team is here to help. They offer us interface modifications, content, improvements and they have answers. They react. The system works and brings real results. Recommendations and improves the user interface on our website.
author: Tomas G.
pros: We are currently using an older system of eshop engine that seemingly cannot be improved. It was done using only a short code without invasive interventions in the otherwise inaccessible source code of the old system. Luigi do not require programmers on our site (in our team and our website)
cons: I have no bad experience since launching, using and managing this solution.

review_title: What a fresh and good toolbox for your searching needs.
description: Our internal dashboard system uses this great tool as an advanced search box. As a cloud-based call center software provider, we collect a lot of data, so we needed a complex solution to search through them. Data about calls, callers, agents, automation set-ups, and call scripts is just a little piece of cake. And naturally good advanced searching is necessary. Results are provided almost instantly and are presented in a good readable way. Finally, other functionalities are so helpful in making everything so seamless.
author: Miroslav P.
pros: Clear and quick step-by-step introduction. Gets Luigi's Box into production really fast.Advanced content-based searching with well-trained AI in the background.Almost instant-like results in a structured readable form.
cons: Settings may be too logical and difficult to understand.More learning resources are on the website. Onboarding portal, webinars.More integrations with e-commerce systems and CRM.

review_title: It helps us make better business and marketing decisions
description: The launch of new shopping mall with its website, mobile app and many digital tools brought many questions regarding the customer needs and journey. Luigi'sBox helped us resolve many mysteries or hypothesis such us what should be the naming of particular features of shopping mall on the website, which shop are they looking for and we don't have it and we should add it and so on...
author: Marek S.
pros: It's super easy to use and integrate with other technologies. The interface and data interpretations are easy to read and navigate. Anytime we need to leverage the search of our customers either on website or in the mobile app, we're able to retrieve all important data and we can rely on them.
cons: There's nothing to dislike. Value for money is very visible.

review_title: Great search results for eshop
description: Very good overally. I wish I would not need it and the search in eshop platform we use would be enough, but we do need it and it does what we pay for.
author: Milos B.
pros: Everything, that shows in search results can be set up. Additionally, the redirections can be set very easily and navigate customer where we need to have him.
cons: Search results are sometimes not correct and they need to be fixed manually. For example sometimes it prioritase product that has nothing to do with search query and the right products is only shown in small window next to it. This can be fixed, but must be done manually.

review_title: Great search for visitors
description: Very good product, we like to use it and to see what our visitors are looking for.
author: Miloš B.
pros: It is easy to use tool to make search results perfect. The options to exactly show results for queries is perfect
cons: B2B integration with Shoptet is not great. As well, some search are not correct. They can be fixed by fix it rule, but this must be done manually always

review_title: Functionality - autocomplete search review
description: Luigi's Box solved our need for a quality tool for autocomplete search on our e-shop. In the future, we plan to use it in the mobile application as well.
author: Viktoria P.
pros: A product is easy to use, with a simple user approach. We have good ratings a reviews for the autocomplet search function from our customers.
cons: Currently, I have nothing to complain about the functionality we use.

review_title: Very nice search Engine and Recommendation
author: Petr M.
pros: Fast search User friendly administration Good Recommendation
cons: The price is a bit higher and the way it is calculated may not be adequate enough

review_title: Luigi's Box for FixShop
author: Lukas K.
pros: Luigi's Box is a great tool for online stores to increase conversions and sales. With great support!
cons: Nothing. Everything working well. Thank You.

review_title: Perfect AI-Powered Site Search!
description: We are able to deliver a better customer experience to our users.
author: Petr G.
pros: It helps our visitors search for anything that they need. Combined with analytics, it's the perfect tool.
cons: There is nothing that I would dislike about this tool.

review_title: Smart search with easy implementation
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Great value, easy to setup, good support
cons: Not having regular calls about insights just monthly report in email
